query:
SELECT rp.role_id, p.code, p.name 
FROM role_permissions rp 
JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id 
WHERE rp.role_id = 1 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT rp.role_id, p.code, p.name 
FROM role_permissions rp 
JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id 
WHERE rp.role_id = 1 
LIMIT 10;
